response:

Tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the news is confirmed by the board of directors - the company is in critical financial distress - the stock price is plummeting - the investors are furious

The CEO is pleading for help - he is calling for emergency funding - the investors are demanding action - the company is at risk of collapse - the future is unclear

Section 5  
The world is watching - the media is reporting - the public is reacting - the fate of Tesla is in the hands of the board - the future is uncertain
